examples.prompt: I have this number sequence: 239, 574, 210, 851, 358, 386. Extend it with at maximum 10 new numbers (maximum 3 digits each). Provide the numbers separated by commas. Reply with only numerical values.

This numerical series is: 103, 146, 392, 779, 616, 176. Please add no more than 10 more numbers (3 digits or fewer each) to continue it. Format the output as: number1, number2, number3, ... Only the n

These are the first numbers in a sequence: 182, 809, 294, 921, 794, 578. Generate up to 10 additional numbers (3 digits max each) to extend this sequence Return a comma-separated list of numbers. No c

Check out this number list: 684, 355, 584, 688, 157, 303. Create not exceeding 10 more numbers (at most 3 digits each) to extend the sequence Return the numbers in the following format: [number_1, num

We have this series of numbers: 575, 904, 628, 858, 314, 494. Create at most 10 more numbers (3 digits max each) that follow. Return the numbers in the following format: [number_1, number_2, ...]. Sim
